title: 宝塚記念の後に・覚悟を刻みて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Takarazuka Kinen sets the stage for yet
another fierce Mejiro showdown. Mejiro Ryan
displays her resolve and comes out victorious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to this, Mejiro McQueen realizes her own
resolve is still lacking.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that the Takarazuka Kinen is over, Mejiro
McQueen sets the autumn Tenno Sho as her new
goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with a dash, she's off to achieve what no one
in her family has done before—successive wins in
the Tenno Sho spring and autumn races.
